full_prompt: Design one representative household pit-latrine reinforced-concrete squat slab per the WaterAid Technical Brief on latrine slabs and superstructures (2023). The slab plan is 900 mm x 900 mm, 70 mm thick, cast from a single-piece precast RC mix with fc >= 20 MPa, reinforced with 6 mm rebar at 150 mm spacing each way in the bottom face plus diagonal corner bars around the squat opening. The slab covers a typical 700 mm x 700 mm household pit with a 100 mm bearing on all four sides onto the pit lining (locally stabilized soil, unfired brick ring, or mass concrete ring). The slab has a central keyhole squat opening 350 mm long x 150 mm wide with rounded ends and footrests molded in relief at the top surface. Design live load is a single concentrated user load of 2.0 kN applied at the slab center, factored by a safety factor of 2.0 per WaterAid brief, giving a verification load of 4.0 kN. Dead load is slab self-weight. Target materials: concrete fc >= 20 MPa, rebar Gr 60 (fy = 420 MPa). Deliverable is a CAD model of the slab (with squat opening, footrests, rebar representation, edge chamfer, and molded handles for lifting) suitable for linear static structural FEA under (a) 2 kN nominal live + self-weight, (b) 4 kN factored live + self-weight, verifying no bending or shear failure. Vibration, thermal, fluid, radiation, buckling analyses are NOT required.
short_prompt:
Design a single-piece precast reinforced-concrete household pit-latrine squat slab per the WaterAid Technical Brief on latrine slabs (2023). Concrete fc >= 20 MPa with 6 mm Gr 60 rebar at 150 mm each way bottom face plus diagonal corner bars around the squat opening; molded footrests, edge chamfer, molded lifting handles. Bears 100 mm each side on the pit lining. Safety factor 2.0 on user concentrated load per the brief. Slab mass <= 60 kg for a 2-person lift.

Envelope: 900 x 900 x 70 mm slab over a 700 x 700 mm pit, with a 350 x 150 mm rounded keyhole squat opening.

Load cases.
- LC1 user nominal: 2.0 kN point load at slab center.
- LC2 user factored (SF 2): 4.0 kN point load at slab center.
- LC3 dead: self-weight.

prompt.title: WaterAid 900 x 900 mm household pit-latrine RC slab
prompt.brief: Design a 900 x 900 x 70 mm precast RC squat slab for a 700 x 700 mm pit with SF 2 on a 2 kN user point load.

boundary_conditions.edges: simple support on 4 sides on pit lining

eval_coverage: RC plate with cast keyhole opening
